WHAT IS DELECTRIC

Energy Management,
Finally Simplified إدارة طاقة منزلك،
باتت أسهل الآن

Delectric is a smart energy intelligence system built for homes and businesses. We combine a compact hardware device with a beautifully designed mobile app to give you complete visibility and control over every watt you consume.

ديليكتريك هو نظام متكامل لذكاء الطاقة مصمم للمنازل والمنشآت. نجمع بين جهاز هاردوير مدمج وتطبيق جوال مصمم بواجهة عصرية لنمنحك رؤية شاملة وتحكماً كاملاً بكل واط يتم استهلاكه.

Our device installs directly on your DIN rail — the standard electrical mounting strip found in all modern circuit breaker panels. No rewiring, no electrician drama. Once installed, it starts learning your home's energy patterns immediately.

يتوافق الجهاز مع معيار DIN الـمُعتمد في لوحات المفاتيح الكهربائية الحديثة، ليركب مباشرة داخل الصندوق الكهربائي دون الحاجة لإعادة تمديد الأسلاك أو تغيير البنية التحتية، ويبدأ فوراً بتحليل الأنماط الكهربائية.

Powered by our proprietary AI engine, Delectric identifies your biggest energy hogs, predicts future bills, and delivers personalized tips that can cut your electricity costs by up to 30% — all in real time, right on your phone.

باستخدام خوارزميات الذكاء الاصطناعي، يحدد ديليكتريك الأجهزة الأكثر استهلاكاً للطاقة، ويتوقع قيمة الفاتورة القادمة، ويقدم توجيهات مخصصة لأسلوب حياتك تساعدك على خفض التكاليف بنسبة تصل إلى 30%.

Live Monitoring
See every appliance's consumption update live, down to the minute.
AI Intelligence
Smart recommendations personalized to your lifestyle and habits.
Detailed Reports
Monthly breakdowns so you always know exactly where your money goes.
Safe & Secure
End-to-end encrypted data. Your energy info stays yours, always.
THE HARDWARE

Engineered for
Precision & Reliability هندسة متكاملة
لـدقة الاستهلاك و الاعتمادية

Display
OLED Window
Status
LED Indicator
Mount Type
DIN Rail

A precision-built device that fits seamlessly into your electrical panel — no retrofitting, no mess. وحدة قياس متطورة مصممة لتتوافق مع معايير الأمان العالمية واللوحات المحلية بدون فوضى.

  • DIN Rail Mounting

    Clips onto your existing breaker panel rail — standard across all modern homes. No drilling, no rewiring, no electrician needed.

  • OLED Status Display

    Built-in OLED screen shows current power usage and cost at a glance — no phone required for quick checks.

  • Multiple Cable Ports

    Multiple input ports to monitor each circuit individually, giving you per-appliance granularity across your whole home.

  • Always-On Sampling

    Samples your electrical load continuously, detecting subtle signature changes to identify individual appliances automatically.

  • Wi-Fi + Cloud Sync

    Connects to your home Wi-Fi and syncs all data securely to the cloud, making it available on your phone anywhere, anytime.

HOW IT WORKS

Up and Running
in Minutes تهيئة ونشاط كامِل
خلال دقائق معدودة

1

Install Device

Clip the Delectric unit onto your panel's DIN rail. Connect the current sensor cables to your main circuits. No power tools required.

2

Connect to App

Download the Delectric app, scan the QR code on the device, and pair it with your home Wi-Fi in under 60 seconds.

3

AI Learns Your Home

Over the first 24 hours, our AI identifies each appliance by its unique electrical signature — no manual labeling needed.

4

Save Money

Get personalized tips, set usage alerts, and watch your electricity bill drop month after month. It's that simple.

Your Energy Dashboard,
Always in Your Pocket لوحة تحكم طاقتك،
دائماً في جيبك

QUESTIONS ANSWERED

Everything You
Need to Know كل ما تريد معرفته

Do I need an electrician to install it?
No! The Delectric device clips directly onto your panel's DIN rail.
Which appliances can it detect?
Delectric can identify air conditioners, water heaters, refrigerators, washing machines, ovens, and most other high-draw appliances.
Is my data private and secure?
Absolutely. All data is encrypted end-to-end and stored securely.
Does it work with Saudi Electricity Company tariffs?
Yes. Delectric is built specifically for the Saudi market with SEC tariff tiers built in.
What Wi-Fi does it need?
Delectric works with any standard 2.4GHz Wi-Fi network.
When will it be available?
We're currently in our early access phase. Sign up now to be among the first to receive a Delectric unit.
